description: Built-in providers known to Amaco's detector. `presetReady: true` means Amaco ships verified prompt-flag defaults; otherwise users run `amaco provider setup` to wire up the right flags for their installation.

providers.label: Claude Code
notes: Default args: -p with prompt on stdin.
Amaco will configure Claude Code automatically.

providers.label: Codex CLI
notes: Starter preset available: `codex exec -q` with stdin prompt.
Run `amaco provider setup` to apply it, then `amaco provider test codex` to verify the flags work in your installed version.

providers.label: Gemini CLI
notes: Google's Gemini CLI. Detected, but Amaco does not yet ship a verified prompt-flag preset.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode, then `amaco provider test gemini`.
providers.installHint: Install the Gemini CLI: `npm install -g @google/gemini-cli`, then run `gemini` once to authenticate.

providers.label: OpenCode
notes: Detected, but Amaco does not ship a verified prompt-flag preset.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode.

providers.label: Aider
notes: Detected, but Amaco does not ship a verified prompt-flag preset.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode.

providers.label: Ollama
notes: Starter preset available: `ollama run qwen3.5` with stdin prompt.
Run `ollama pull qwen3.5` first, or edit providers.ollama.args to use another local model.
Run `amaco provider setup` to apply it, then `amaco provider test ollama` to verify the model responds.
providers.installHint: Install Ollama: `curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh` (Linux/macOS) or download it from https://ollama.com/download.

providers.label: Qwen Code
notes: Alibaba's Qwen Code CLI (an agentic coding CLI). Detected; no verified preset shipped.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode.

providers.label: Crush
notes: Charm's Crush coding agent. Detected; no verified preset shipped.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode.
providers.installHint: Install Crush: `brew install charmbracelet/tap/crush` (macOS) or see https://github.com/charmbracelet/crush.

providers.label: Goose
notes: Block's Goose agent CLI. Detected; no verified preset shipped.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode.

providers.label: Cursor CLI
notes: Cursor's headless agent CLI (`cursor-agent`). Detected; no verified preset shipped.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode.
providers.installHint: Install the Cursor CLI: `curl https://cursor.com/install -fsS | bash`.

providers.label: Amp
notes: Sourcegraph's Amp CLI. Detected; no verified preset shipped.
Run `amaco provider setup` to confirm command, args, and input mode.
